channel.title: Mk Hasan Blog
channel.description: A blog about programming, data and web development.

item.title: Agentic AI Design Patterns — Part 1: The Catalog & Learning Path
item.description: Part 1 introduces agentic-ai-overview — a hands-on catalog of 15 LangGraph design patterns with three shared scenarios, and explains how to learn agentic AI by comparing patterns on the same domain.
item.author: hasan.alive@gmail.com (Mk Hasan)

item.title: Agentic AI Design Patterns — Part 2: Scenarios & Shared Runtime
item.description: Part 2 explains the three shared scenarios (IT helpdesk, e-commerce, ML pipeline) and the shared runtime that lets every pattern example run with the same CLI, tools, and LangGraph helpers.
item.author: hasan.alive@gmail.com (Mk Hasan)

item.title: Agentic AI Design Patterns — Part 3: Foundation & Workflow Patterns
item.description: Part 3 covers patterns 01–06 — ReAct, Tool Use, Planning, Prompt Chaining, Routing, and Parallelization — with LangGraph flow diagrams and runnable commands for each.
item.author: hasan.alive@gmail.com (Mk Hasan)

item.title: Agentic AI Design Patterns — Part 4: Control, Multi-Agent & Production
item.description: Part 4 covers patterns 07–15 — orchestration, safety, memory, RAG, and event-driven agents — plus how to move from runnable examples to production architecture.
item.author: hasan.alive@gmail.com (Mk Hasan)

item.title: Building a Social Multi-Agent System — Part 1: The Big Picture
item.description: Part 1 introduces a LangGraph-powered social feed where AI agents compose posts, validate them, publish to a real API, and simulate engagement — and explains why I built it.
item.author: hasan.alive@gmail.com (Mk Hasan)

item.title: Building a Social Multi-Agent System — Part 3: The LangGraph Pipeline
item.description: Part 3 walks through the LangGraph StateGraph — every node, the validator retry loop, GraphState fields, and how three AI personas collaborate on one post.
item.author: hasan.alive@gmail.com (Mk Hasan)

item.title: Building a Social Multi-Agent System — Part 4: Architecture, Memory & Operations
item.description: Part 4 covers hexagonal architecture, the agent memory model, the background worker, Docker deployment, and the live agent explorer for learning multi-agent systems.
item.author: hasan.alive@gmail.com (Mk Hasan)
